markdown:
#  Edit Personal Information in Your Free Procore Account 
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Log in to your free Procore account.
  2. Click the **Account and Profile** icon.  
This shows as your initials by default, or an avatar if you uploaded an image.  
![Clipboard E9b3dd608eb9b4763274375196ed0fe](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/9eaf92a665aa50208e0251e39d8fb7fb/1e5f7dd8894b7d0dfaff6158909301c0/clipboard_e9b3dd608eb9b42b763274375196ed0fe.png?fm=webp)
  3. Click **My Account**.
  4. In the Personal Information section, click the **edit** ![Icon Edit2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/60cfc64d76d10b52cd7d785b4bfdc9e5/794e5b31acad2246f1d1f6fb29a3d532/icon-edit2.png?fm=webp&h=16) icon.
  5. Edit the information as necessary.
  6. Click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Free Procore Account - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)
  * [Claim your Business on the Procore Construction Network](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/claim-your-business-on-the-procore-construction-network)
  * [What variables can we include as placeholders in a lien waiver template?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-variables-can-we-include-as-placeholders-in-a-lien-waiver-template)
title: Edit Personal Information in Your Free Procore Account
description: How to edit personal information, such as your name or contact info, in your free Procore account.
